about.story_p1: Barqawi Cars & Vermittlungen in Fellbach, near Stuttgart, is a company with long-standing experience, expertise and in-depth knowledge in the field of car trading and brokerage of goods of all kinds.
about.story_p2: Founded in 2012 and owner-operated since its inception, Barqawi specialises in buying and importing new and used vehicles from Germany, as well as their worldwide export — particularly to Arab countries and the Middle East. We also operate in the brokerage of various European products.
about.check_1: Wide selection of new, EU and used vehicles
about.check_2: Fair prices — whether buying or taking in trade
about.check_4: Competent, direct and friendly point of contact
about.check_8: Reliable implementation of your individual requirements
about.milestone_1_desc: Barqawi Cars & Vermittlungen established in Fellbach.
about.milestone_2_desc: Development of the European partner network.
about.milestone_3_desc: Opening of services to the Maghreb and Gulf.
about.services_section_subtitle: Solutions for individuals and companies — import, export and product brokerage
about.import_2: Research into the best products and market prices
about.import_3: Product inspection to ensure the desired quality
about.import_5: Custom manufacturing with your brand and packaging
about.import_6: Product duplication based on provided sample
about.import_7: Best available prices on German and Chinese markets
about.import_8: Organisation of factory and market visits
about.import_9: Continuous follow-up before, during and after manufacturing
about.export_svc_1: Full product study and marketing feasibility
about.export_svc_2: Presentation and showcasing of products to be marketed
about.export_svc_3: Follow-up on agreements to meet all conditions
about.export_svc_4: Electronic marketplace through an online product catalogue
about.export_svc_6: New and used vehicles available for export
about.export_svc_7: Delivery to Arab countries, the Middle East and beyond
about.export_svc_8: Handling of all customs and administrative formalities
about.value_1_desc: Wahrhaftigkeit — truth as the foundation of every client relationship.
about.value_2_desc: Ehrlichkeit — complete transparency at every step of your project.
about.value_3_desc: Verlässlichkeit & Glaubwürdigkeit — trust earned through our actions.
about.value_4_desc: Qualität — excellence in every service and every vehicle offered.
about.team_1_desc: Strategy, quality and international network development.
about.team_2_desc: Expert in export solutions and personalised support.
about.team_3_desc: Here to answer all your questions.
about.founder_bio: Automotive and export specialist since 2012, Mr. Barqawi runs BARQAWI Fahrzeughandel from Fellbach, 10 minutes from Stuttgart. Over 12+ years, he has helped hundreds of clients across France, Europe and North Africa source and export premium vehicles from Germany.
export.zone_europe_desc: Fast delivery throughout France and the European Union.
export.zone_maghreb_desc: Regular export to Morocco, Algeria, Tunisia and Libya.
export.zone_gulf_desc: Shipments to Dubai, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait…
export.step_1_desc: Select your vehicle from our catalogue or describe your needs to us.
export.step_2_desc: We prepare a personalised quote including the vehicle, logistics and taxes.
export.step_3_desc: Quote validation, document signing and secure payment.
export.step_4_desc: Shipment and tracking to destination. We handle everything.
export.faq_a1: We take care of everything: registration document, certificate of conformity, customs declaration, and all documents for your destination country.
export.faq_a2: 3–7 days for Europe, 3–4 weeks for the Maghreb, 4–6 weeks for Gulf countries. Tracking is provided at every step.
export.faq_q3: What payment methods do you accept?
export.faq_a3: Bank transfer, card payment and flexible financing solutions depending on your project.
export.faq_q4: Do you handle registration in my country?
export.faq_a4: Yes, we coordinate registration through our local partners. All-inclusive service from A to Z.
export.faq_a5: Yes, all our vehicles are exportable. Some already have the 'Export available' status to simplify the process.
export.form_request_subtitle: Fill in the form and we'll call you back within 24h.

legal.page_desc: Legal information about the publisher and website hosting.
legal.editor_company: BARQAWI Vente et courtage de véhicules
legal.host_address: Hosting provider address to be completed
legal.ip_text: All content on this site (texts, images, logos) is the exclusive property of BARQAWI Vente et courtage de véhicules. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior written permission.
legal.liability_text: BARQAWI Vente et courtage de véhicules strives to keep the information on this site up to date and accurate. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or currency of the published information.
legal.data_text: Data collected via the contact form is used solely to respond to your requests. It is never passed on to third parties. In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to access, correct and delete your data.
terms.page_desc: Terms of use and general sales conditions of BARQAWI Fahrzeughandel.
terms.use_text: By accessing this site, you agree to these general terms and conditions. BARQAWI Fahrzeughandel reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the site after modification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.offer_text: Vehicles listed on this site are offered subject to availability. Prices are in euros (€), VAT included where applicable. BARQAWI Vente et courtage de véhicules reserves the right to change prices without notice.
terms.order_text: Any enquiry submitted via the contact form does not constitute a sales contract. A sale is only finalised upon signing a written purchase order and payment of an agreed deposit between the parties.
terms.warranty_text: Used vehicles are sold as-is unless otherwise stated. New vehicles benefit from the manufacturer's warranty. BARQAWI Vente et courtage de véhicules accepts no liability for defects not disclosed at the time of sale.
terms.export_text: For vehicles intended for export, the buyer is solely responsible for complying with customs and tax regulations in the destination country. BARQAWI Vente et courtage de véhicules can provide standard export documents upon request.
terms.jurisdiction_text: These terms are governed by German law. Any dispute falls under the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Stuttgart (Germany).
privacy.page_desc: How BARQAWI collects, uses and protects your personal data in accordance with GDPR.
privacy.collect_text: When using the contact form, we collect the following information: full name, email address, phone number, country of residence and message. This data is provided voluntarily by the user.
privacy.purpose_text: Collected data is used exclusively to respond to your enquiries, quotes or export requests. It is never used for commercial purposes without your explicit consent.
privacy.retention_text: Your data is retained for a maximum of 3 years from your last interaction with our services. After this period, it is deleted from our systems.
privacy.third_text: Your personal data is never sold, rented or passed on to third parties for commercial purposes. It may only be shared with our logistics partners strictly within the scope of fulfilling your export request.
privacy.rights_text: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights: right of access, right of rectification, right to erasure ('right to be forgotten'), right to restriction of processing, right to data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at info@barqawi-cars.de.
privacy.cookies_text: This site only uses technical cookies necessary for its proper operation (session, CSRF security). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.
privacy.contact_text: For any questions regarding your personal data or to exercise your rights, you can contact us by email at info@barqawi-cars.de or by post at: BARQAWI Vente et courtage de véhicules, Salierstr. 44, D – 70736 Fellbach, Germany.
